title: Iran's president vows not to hit neighbors as U.S.-Israeli strikes continue
summary_full: The U.S. says it has hit more than 3,000 Iranian targets in the first week of the war, as Iran's president vows to halt attacks on neighbors.
summary_public: The U.S. says it has hit more than 3,000 Iranian targets in the first week of the war, as Iran's president vows to halt attacks on neighbors.

IR.label: mixed
IR.evidence: Iran's president vows not to hit neighbors as U.S.-Israeli strikes continue
